basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Clerk, Peon and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Pharmacist, Lab Technician, Clerk, Peon Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ECHS. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the ECHS Pharmacist, Lab Technician, Clerk, Peon Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Pharmacy/10+2 with science stream (PCB) and Diploma in Pharmacy, DMLT/Class-I Lab Tech Course (Armed Forces), Graduate/Class-I Clerical Trade (Armed Forces), 8th Class/GD Trade from Armed Forces
qualification.details: Pharmacist: B. Pharmacy/10+2 with science stream (PCB) and Diploma in Pharmacy Lab Technician: DMLT/Class-I Lab Tech Course (Armed Forces) Clerk: Graduate/Class-I Clerical Trade (Armed Forces) Peon: 8th Class/GD Trade from Armed Forces

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.ex_servicemen_contributory_health_scheme: B. Pharmacy/10+2 with science stream (PCB) and Diploma in Pharmacy, DMLT/Class-I Lab Tech Course (Armed Forces), Graduate/Class-I Clerical Trade (Armed Forces), 8th Class/GD Trade from Armed Forces

content_sections.heading: ECHS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ECHS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Pharmacist: B. Pharmacy/10+2 with science stream (PCB) and Diploma in Pharmacy Lab Technician: DMLT/Class-I Lab Tech Course (Armed Forces) Clerk: Graduate/Class-I Clerical Trade (Armed Forces) Peon: 8th Class/GD Trade from Armed Forces

rows.event: Last Date of receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 is 19th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the ECHS Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are for the posts of Pharmacist, Lab Technician, Clerk, and Peon.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the ECHS posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the ECHS posts ranges from Rs. 21,800 to Rs. 36,500 per month, depending on the post. The specific salary for each post is detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. For Pharmacist, B. Pharmacy/Diploma in Pharmacy is required. For Lab Technician, DMLT is needed. Graduates are eligible for Clerk, and 8th class pass for Peon. Specific details are available in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ECHS Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 primarily involves an Interview. Candidates who perform well in the interview will be considered for the respective posts.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form for ECHS Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in. Ensure you download the form from the authentic source.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of ECHS?
faq.answer: The official website of the Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) is www.echs.gov.in. This website provides all the necessary information regarding recruitment and other services.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The job type for the ECHS Recruitment 2026 is contractual. This means that the selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for a specified period as per the terms of the recruitment.
